name: djungle-plugins
description: Plugin marketplace Djungle — agenti AI, skill operative, integrazioni MCP per clienti FNX / Djungle Bridge / Space.

plugins.name: djungle-agent-os
plugins.description: Connect Claude to the Djungle Agent OS. v4.5.0: Scribe autonomo — Session Digestion server-side (scribe_digest) estrae i fact dal transcript al /wb con Haiku. v4.4.x: user-aware auth, Personal API Key, switch tenant. v4.3.x: multi-tenant + brand emoji. v4.2.x: Librarian. v4.1.x: custom agents UI, marketplace, /sota-board, agent versioning. Self-service portal su agents.djungle.io.
